details.test: Task 1: Book 60-min massage under $120 on weekend afternoon at nearest branch
Task 2: Purchase $150 digital spa gift card with birthday design and custom message
Task 3: Schedule couples spa package with allergy note (no couples packages available in data, verified graceful handling)
Task 4: Choose high-rated treatment with most add-ons and add to wishlist
Task 5: Buy 1-month yoga pass under $200 with >=8 classes starting next Monday (no yoga memberships available in data, verified graceful handling)
Task 6: Book three different same-day services (including 30-min) after 3 PM
Task 7: Book cheapest 45–60 min sauna/hydrotherapy session on Friday evening (no sauna/hydrotherapy services available in data, verified graceful handling)
Task 8: Enroll two participants in next-month evening meditation workshop with CALM10 promo (no meditation workshops available in data, verified graceful handling)
Task 9: Create custom 3-service package under $250 and proceed to guest checkout
